author: Mark Atwood
text: Cannot simply add #[non_exhaustive] — all 20+ inventory::submit! calls across backend crates use struct literal construction from outside secretx-core, which #[non_exhaustive] prohibits. Fix requires: (1) add BackendRegistration::new(name, factory) constructors, (2) update all inventory::submit! calls to use constructors, (3) then add #[non_exhaustive]. This is a multi-crate refactor. Recommend deferring to a dedicated PR.
